allow: PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","streamlit","run","app/app.py","--server.headless","true","--server.port","8520" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "streamlit_stdout.log" -RedirectStandardError "streamlit_stderr.log"; Write-Output "PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8520/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8520/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) bytes=$\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \(Test-Path "streamlit_stderr.log"\) { Write-Output "--- stderr ---"; Get-Content streamlit_stderr.log -Tail 30 } if \(Test-Path "streamlit_stdout.log"\) { Write-Output "--- stdout ---"; Get-Content streamlit_stdout.log -Tail 30 } })

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\venv\\Scripts\\streamlit.exe" -ArgumentList "run","app/app.py","--server.headless","true","--server.port","8520" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "streamlit_stdout.log" -RedirectStandardError "streamlit_stderr.log"; Write-Output "PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8520/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) bytes=$\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \(Test-Path "streamlit_stderr.log"\) { Write-Output "--- stderr ---"; Get-Content streamlit_stderr.log -Tail 30 } if \(Test-Path "streamlit_stdout.log"\) { Write-Output "--- stdout ---"; Get-Content streamlit_stdout.log -Tail 30 } })
